steps.title: Find the contrast signal
steps.content: The key signal is the word “but” in Text 2, which introduces a counter‑example to the claim that automated genre classification has failed and reached its technological limit.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D asserts that it is possible to improve automated classification systems, matching the Text 2 point that a solution was found despite earlier struggles. The other three choices either discuss listener opinions, criticism of past research, or disagreement among listeners—none of which are supported by Text 2.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
